meta.title: Haiti 3-0 Mexico (8 Jul, 2022) Final Score - ESPN (UK)
meta.description: Game summary of the Haiti vs. Mexico Concacaf W Championship game, final score 3-0, from 8 July 2022 on ESPN (UK).

West Indies Women tour of England 2025

articles.headline: Gotham hungry to win inaugural Women's Champions Cup
articles.description: Gotham FC already has a league trophy and a confederation title, so, naturally, the next step is an intercontinental championship, coach Juan Carlos Amorós said.

images.alt: Gotham hungry to win inaugural Women's Champions Cup

articles.headline: Olivia Moultrie: I can't wait to continue my journey with the Portland Thorns
articles.description: USWNT's Olivia Moultrie believes signing a contract extension with the Portland Thorns is the right decision at this stage in her career.

images.alt: Olivia Moultrie: I can't wait to continue my journey with the Portland Thorns

articles.headline: 1 year after drone cheating scandal, Canada eyes 2027 World Cup
articles.description: It's been about a year since Canada was accused of cheating at the Olympics. With a new coach and lofty goals for the 2027 Women's World Cup, players are still trying to move on.

images.alt: 1 year after drone cheating scandal, Canada eyes 2027 World Cup

allCommentary.dtls: Second Half ends, Haiti Women 3, Mexico 0.
Attempt missed. Alicia Cervantes (Mexico) header from the centre of the box is close, but misses the top right corner. Assisted by Kenti Robles with a cross.

keyEvents.dtls: Goal!  Haiti Women 1, Mexico 0. Roselord Borgella (Haiti Women) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Rebeca Bernal (Mexico) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Mexico. Alicia Cervantes replaces Myra Delgadillo.
keyEvents.shrtDtls: On: Alicia Cervantes | Off: Myra Delgadillo

keyEvents.dtls: Substitution, Mexico. Lizbeth Ovalle replaces Katty Martínez.
keyEvents.shrtDtls: On: Lizbeth Ovalle | Off: Katty Martínez

keyEvents.dtls: Emily Alvarado (Mexico) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Haiti Women 2, Mexico 0. Nérilia Mondésir (Haiti Women) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Kenti Robles (Mexico) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Mexico. Cristina Ferral replaces Rebeca Bernal because of an injury.
keyEvents.shrtDtls: On: Cristina Ferral | Off: Rebeca Bernal

keyEvents.dtls: Greta Espinoza (Mexico) is shown the red card.
Goal!  Haiti Women 3, Mexico 0. Sherly Jeudy (Haiti Women) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the top left corner.
Substitution, Haiti Women. Bethina Petit-Frère replaces Ruthny Mathurin.
keyEvents.shrtDtls: On: Betina Petit-Frère | Off: Ruthny Mathurin
